productDisplayName: Nike Men Total90 Exacto Blue Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who demand performance and style, the nike Total90 Exacto 3 VTR shoe is a great soccer cleat, offering absolute ball contact with lavish-yet-aggressive look. It’s an ideal shoe for those seeking comfort and strength during a heated match. UpperSynthetic upper for lightweight comfortUniform surface with stitch detailing for greater ball feel and accuracySwoosh overlays on the sides for greater midfoot supportLace-ups for snug FitMildly padded collar and tongue MidsolePhylon midsole with injected EVA footbed for lightweight comfort and shock absorption OutsoleStrategically placed multi-directional lugs on durable rubber outsole for optimum tractionShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
